name: Insertion at the head of Linked List
category: Learn LinkedList [Single LL, Double LL, Medium, Hard Problems]
statement: Given the head of a singly linked list and an integer X, insert a node with value X at the head of the linked list and return the head of the modified list.
constraints:
• 0 <= number of nodes in the Linked List <= 1000
  • 0 <= ListNode.val <= 100
  • 0 <= X <= 100
